visual_description: The audio opens with a modern, rhythmic electronic beat that creates a tense and suspenseful atmosphere. A close-up shot focuses on a man with short, dark hair in a dimly lit room. He wears large, black over-ear headphones and looks down with an intense, focused expression, his face illuminated by a bright light from below, likely from a computer screen. He adjusts the headphones with both hands. In the top left corner, white Chinese characters, "风行网," are visible. A male voice speaks a short, clipped phrase in a calm and matter-of-fact tone, as if concluding a task. The camera cuts to a close-up of a different man, also in a dark setting. He has a small earring in his left ear and looks slightly off-camera with a serious, contemplative expression. The background is dark and out of focus. The same white Chinese characters, "风行网," appear in the top left corner. The shot changes to a medium view of a man and a woman standing side-by-side in what appears to be a convenience store at night. The woman, on the left, has long dark hair and is smiling. The man, on the right, has a more neutral expression. The store is filled with shelves
